meaning: n.拦河坝,堰,阻塞,(敌军前进的)弹幕射击
examples: He was faced with a barrage of angry questions from the floor.
And now this barrage of criticism.
The Marina Barrage is another case in point.
To counter the barrage of copyright concern, Pinterest introduced a simple, no fuss solution.
Mr. Yang and fellow directors turned down the offer, igniting a barrage of criticism.
